question: What are the state-of-the-art navigation and obstacle avoidance approaches for humanoid robots in 2023-2025? Compare Nav2-based methods vs learning-based methods (RL navigation, end-to-end). Focus on…
conclusion: End-to-end RL policies with raw LiDAR point cloud processing (P3O-CBF, Omni-Perception) are the SOTA for humanoid navigation in 2024-2025, outperforming Nav2+MPPI stacks for 3D obstacle avoidance; Super-LIO (OctVox) is the most efficient LIO alternative to FAST-LIO2 for compute-constrained platform…
